title: jacobaea × lyratifolia
intro: Jacobaea × lyratifolia is a hybrid plant species within the Senecio genus, resulting from the cross between Jacobaea aquatica and Jacobaea maritima. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and bloating. The health benefits of Jacobaea × lyratifolia include its potential to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce fluid retention and alleviate symptoms associated with kidney and urinary issues. Jacobaea × lyratifolia can be prepared into herbal remedies, such as teas and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
